headline: Is Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (HII) a Top Undervalued Aerospace and Defense Stock to Buy After Q1?
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (NYSE:HII) is an undervalued aerospace and defense stock to buy. On May 5, Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) delivered robust first-quarter 2026 results, driven by strong revenue growth. Revenue in the quarter was up 13.4% year over year to $3.1 billion, driven by growth at Newport News Shipbuilding, Ingalls Shipbuilding, and Mission […]
